channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Middle East latest: Families welcome news of 3 more male hostages to be released
item.description: The organization representing families of hostages held in the Gaza strip was celebrating the news that three male hostages would be released Saturday as part of the ceasefire agreement between Israel and Hamas.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: FireAid delivered loads of surprises. Here are some of the best moments from the musical benefit
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — The FireAid benefit was fueled by some of music’s best performers to raise money for Los Angeles-area wildfire relief efforts.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr. and MARK KENNEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What to know about the NTSB and the investigation into the DC plane crash
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A collision between an American Airlines passenger jet and an Army helicopter near Washington, D.C., that killed 67 people brought renewed focus on the federal agency charged with investigating aviation disasters.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patel dodges, demurs as Democrats press him on controversial statements
item.description: Kash Patel, President Trump’s pick to lead the FBI, wouldn’t acknowledge or sought to distance himself from a host of his past public statements as Democrats pressed him during his confirmation hearing on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: South Carolina prepares for third execution since September
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — South Carolina is preparing to execute the third inmate to be put to death since September as the state goes through a backlog of prisoners who exhausted their appeals while the state couldn't find lethal injection drugs. Marion Bowman Jr.'s execution is scheduled for 6 p.m.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Mushers and dogs braved a horrific Alaska winter to deliver lifesaving serum 100 years ago
item.description: ANCHORAGE, Alaska (AP) — The Alaska Gold Rush town of Nome faced a bleak winter. It was hundreds of miles from anywhere, cut off by the frozen sea and unrelenting blizzards, and under siege from a contagious disease known as the “strangling angel” for the way it suffocated children.
item.dc:creator: MARK THIESSEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Midair collision kills 67 people in the deadliest US air disaster in almost a quarter century
item.description: ARLINGTON, Va. (AP) — A midair collision between an Army helicopter and a jetliner killed all 67 people aboard the two aircraft, officials said Thursday, as they scrutinized the actions of the military pilot in the country's deadliest aviation disaster in almost a quarter century.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, TARA COPP, ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and LEA SKENE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 12-year-old girl among figure skaters killed in DC plane crash
item.description: A 12-year-old Maryland girl was among the figure skaters who were killed after an American Airlines jet and Army helicopter collided near Washington D.C. Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Sierra Rains, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The Latest: Collision between passenger jet and Army helicopter near DC leaves no survivors
item.description: A collision between an American Airlines passenger jet and an Army helicopter at Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport near Washington, D.C, killed 67 people, including more than a dozen figure skaters.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Marianne Faithfull, singer, actress and Rolling Stones muse, dies at 78
item.description: The 1960s icon passed in London surrounded by family, according to a statement from her record promotion group.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, Fox 5

item.title: South Carolina death row inmate maintains his innocence and won't ask for clemency
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — After the U.S. Supreme Court rejected the final appeal of a South Carolina inmate, he decided not to ask the governor for clemency, saying he didn't want to spend the rest of his life in prison for a murder he has always insisted he did not commit. Marion Bowman Jr.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: NASA's 2 stuck astronauts take their first spacewalk together
item.description: CAPE CANAVERAL, Fla. (AP) — NASA’s two stuck astronauts took their first spacewalk together Thursday, exiting the International Space Station almost eight months after moving in.
item.dc:creator: MARCIA DUNN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mid-air collision draws attention to military helicopter training, previous accidents
item.description: To learn to fly a military helicopter is to take a master class in multitasking. You need both hands and both feet to control the aircraft while keeping a close eye on the horizon and your altitude.
item.dc:creator: BEN FINLEY and DYLAN LOVAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: NTSB leads investigation into deadly DC plane crash
item.description: The National Transportation Safety Board is leading an investigation into how the American Airlines plane collided with the military helicopter.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Brandt, KRON4

item.title: Staffing at Reagan Washington National Airport air control tower was 'not normal' on night of collision: FAA
item.description: The staffing at the air control tower at Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport was "not normal" when an American Airlines plane and an Army helicopter collided on Wednesday night, a report shows.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tennessee GOP passes school voucher expansion bill with backing from Trump
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Tennessee lawmakers on Thursday approved legislation drastically expanding the number of families who can use taxpayer money on private schools regardless of income, a long-sought victory for Republican Gov.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN MATTISE and KIMBERLEE KRUESI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Olympians Nancy Kerrigan, Tenley Albright in tears after DC air crash kills members of Boston skating club
item.description: Two teenage figure skaters, their mothers, and two former world champions who were coaching at a historic Boston club were among the 14 members of the skating community killed when an American Airlines flight collided with an Army helicopter Wednesday night and crashed into the frigid waters of the
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA and JIMMY GOLEN AP Sports Writers, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Aviation expert weighs in on how aircraft crash near DC may have happened
item.description: An aviation expert told Nexstar's WDCW that the altitude of both the passenger plane and Army helicopter may have played a principal role in the aircraft collision near Reagan National Airport (DCA).
item.dc:creator: Anna Chen, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: No Super Bowl rally if Kansas City Chiefs beat Philadelphia Eagles: Sources
item.description: Multiple sources have confirmed that should the Kansas City Chiefs win Super Bowl LIX, there will be no rally for the public.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: NFL kicker Justin Tucker accused of sexual misconduct by 6 masseuses: report
item.description: Justin Tucker, kicker for the Baltimore Ravens, has been accused by six massage therapists at four separate businesses of sexually inappropriate behavior, the Baltimore Banner reported Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Reagan National Airport one of world's most complex airspaces
item.description: Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport (DCA) services both military helicopters and passenger planes every day.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Florida AG reduces pool contractor judgment from $1.9 million to $60 grand
item.description: This is after the attorney general spent years investigating the companies after complaints of dozens of unfinished swimming pools.
item.dc:creator: Shannon Behnken, NewsNation

item.title: Missing Colorado juvenile found in Houston; Suspect arrested by Bellaire police
item.description: BELLAIRE, Texas (KIAH) – A missing juvenile from Colorado has been safely recovered in Houston, thanks to the swift action by the Bellaire Police Department.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Estrada, Fox 5

item.title: Here's how much Super Bowl viewers are expected to spend on food, drinks
item.description: With the Kansas City Chiefs and Philadelphia Eagles gearing up for the Super Bowl LIX, a new LendingTree report found that Americans are planning to splurge more on the big game this year.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Republicans leave Florida frustrated with lack of final plan to pass Trump agenda
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) arrived at this week’s House Republican retreat with hopes of uniting the fractious GOP conference around a plan to pass President Trump's agenda — but instead, the group is departing south Florida with rising tensions in its ranks. Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, Fox 5

item.title: Passenger jet with 64 aboard collides with Army helicopter while landing at Reagan Airport near DC
item.description: ARLINGTON, Va. (AP) — An American Airlines jet carrying 60 passengers and four crew members collided Wednesday with an Army helicopter while landing at Ronald Reagan National Airport near Washington, prompting a large search-and-rescue operation in the nearby Potomac River.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, TARA COPP and ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Video captures fiery crash between American Airlines flight and Army Blackhawk
item.description: Editor's note: The video may appear graphic to some viewers. (NEXSTAR) - Images from the EarthCam video service captured images of what appears to be the fiery crash of an American Airlines jet over the Potomac River Wednesday evening.
item.dc:creator: Bill Disbrow, ABC 4

item.title: Regional jet carrying 64, military helicopter on training flight collide near Reagan National Airport
item.description: A regional jet carrying 60 passengers and four crew members collided with a military helicopter on Wednesday night as it approached Washington Reagan National Airport. The flight was en route from Wichita, Kan., to Washington, D.C., American Airlines said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: Elvia Limon, KRON4

item.title: Trump White House rescinds memo freezing federal money after widespread confusion
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump's budget office on Wednesday rescinded a memo freezing spending on federal loans and grants, less than two days after it sparked widespread confusion and legal challenges across the country.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, ZEKE MILLER and LISA MASCARO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Hawaii wildfire victims spared from testifying after last-minute deal over $4B settlement
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — Lawyers representing victims of a deadly Hawaii wildfire reached a last-minute deal averting a trial that was scheduled to begin Wednesday over how to split a $4 billion settlement.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER SINCO KELLEHER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Former US Sen. Bob Menendez gets 11 years in prison for taking bribes and acting as agent of Egypt
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Former U.S. Sen. Bob Menendez was sentenced Wednesday to 11 years in prison for accepting bribes of gold and cash and acting as an agent of Egypt — crimes his lawyer said he’s been mocked for as “Gold Bar Bob.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER and MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Gymnast dies after falling from pole while celebrating Philadelphia Eagles win
item.description: Tyler Sabapathy, 18, "sustained critical injuries" in the fall and passed away Tuesday, Temple University announced.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Yakubovsky, Fox 5

item.title: Republican congressman suggests students get jobs to pay for lunches
item.description: Republican Rep. Ritch McCormick (R-Ga.) suggested that students should get jobs to pay for their lunches as the federal funding freeze proposed by President Trump threatens nutrition support for children across the country.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: Florida Republican introduces bill to add Trump to Mount Rushmore
item.description: The Interior Department would be in charge of undertaking Trump’s addition to the South Dakota landmark if approved by Congress.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: WATCH: Miles-long cluster of dolphins captured on drone video
item.description: A miles-long cluster of dolphins has been filmed leaping and gliding across Carmel Bay off California, forming an unusual “super pod” of more than 1,500 of the marine creatures.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: States lose access to Medicaid payment portal amid Trump federal aid freeze
item.description: State Medicaid programs across the country are reporting they've lost access to federal payment portals one day after President Trump announced a freeze on federal grants and aid.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Choi, Fox 5

item.title: Person seen firing gun into air amid crowd of Philadelphia Eagles fans; police investigating
item.description: Video of the alleged incident, shared to X late on Sunday, appeared to show a large crowd celebrating the Eagles' win when a person raised the gun into the air.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4
